report.title: Enterprise AI Reference Architectures: The Six-Layer Institutional Trust Stack
report.abstract: This module specifies the standardized reference architecture for G-SIFI enterprise AI systems. It details the six-layer stack (Experience, Immune System, Nervous System, Brain, Memory, Foundation), the implementation of Sentinel v2.4, WorkflowAI Pro, and EAIP, and provides reference implementations for AGI-TRADER-PROD-01 and CRS-UUID-001 systems.
report.content:
# 1. The Six-Layer Enterprise AI Stack (EAIS)
## 1.1 Architectural Topology The EAIS isolates reasoning kernels from the management plane to ensure safety and interoperability.
1. **Experience (Next.js/React)**: Explainability frontends and A-HITL verification gates. 2. **Immune System (Sentinel v2.4)**: Real-time GDL enforcement sidecars and OPA-based policy gating. 3. **Nervous System (EAIP/gRPC)**: mTLS-secured, SPIFFE-identity-anchored A2A communication. 4. **Brain (Reasoning Kernel)**: Frontier reasoning models (WorkflowAI Pro decomposition). 5. **Memory (Vector/RAG/Provenance)**: Merkle-DAG context store with zero-trust DLP middleware. 6. **Foundation (AWS/Azure Infrastructure)**: Nitro Enclaves and HardwareEnclaveAttestor (HEA) for TEE execution.
---
# 2. Operational Trust Components
## 2.1 Kafka-based WORM Audit Logging Telemetry is streamed to a zero-trust Apache Kafka cluster. - **WORM Enforcement**: S3 Object Lock (7-year retention) for archived logs. - **Integrity**: Daily cryptographic verification using Merkle-root-based hash chains.
## 2.2 Docker Swarm & Kubernetes Security - **Isolation**: Agentic containers execute in rootless mode with minimal syscall sets (Seccomp profiles). - **Service Mesh**: Istio-secured sidecars enforce mTLS identity federation across the Nervous System.
---
# 3. Reference Governance Implementations
## 3.1 AGI-TRADER-PROD-01 (High-Frequency Trading) - **Primary Risk**: Systemic market collusion (Agentic Escapement). - **Control**: Shannon Entropy monitoring of the A2A graph. Sudden drops trigger immediate SEV-0 power-cut. - **Compliance**: EU AI Act Article 55 (Systemic Risk GPAI).
## 3.2 CRS-UUID-001 (Credit Risk Scoring) - **Primary Risk**: Disparate impact and PII leakage. - **Control**: Recursive Context Envelopes (RCE) with PII-redaction middleware. - **Compliance**: SR 11-7 validation and Basel III Capital Drift monitoring.
